sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Vantung kongkhakte taang pempam.
A Sabuaite kiphah dimdem .
Kong honsa gei-ah mi khat ding veh.
A tee zialzial gun ka mu a,
Ka ten nading mun hita,
Hih zah liangin, Inn lunggulh ngei ke'ng.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Tua khuapi tee zeizai, Inn ka tu'n ding zong hong nai,
Ka pa'n kongkhak gei-ah, hong ngak zen veleh,
Hih leitung gam simtham pan, Suakta ding kiging zo tang,
Hih zah liangin Inn lunggulh ngei ke'ng,

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Ainnkuankuan in kikhawm uh,
A mai tai thei mahmah uh,
A dahmai cihbang kimu lo hi,
Lunggulhna tawh ka khi luang a,
Kha nei leng ka leng nuam ta,
Hih zah liangin Inn lunggulh ngei ke'ng.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Puanpak silhin lasa ziahziah,
Tuuno pahtawina la hi,
Kham gawsem tumin misiang honpi,
Phat khawm veni amau bangmah,
Tatsa misiangte hi hang,
Hih zah liangin Inn lunggulh ngei ke'ng.
